event: White Church at Newport, New England
symbols: white church steeple — the visible center of community faith and worship
lush gardens — the flourishing of settled, devout community life
description: A bright, sun-drenched scene of a New England village with a white church steeple rising above surrounding rooftops and lush green gardens. The church steeple is tall and slender with a bell opening visible. Flowers and dense vegetation fill the foreground, with white picket fences and neighboring houses visible. The sky is vivid blue. The brushwork is loose and light-filled, creating a shimmering, vibrant atmosphere.

_meta.title: White Church at Newport (aka Church in a New England Village)
